home.heroSubtitle: A curated selection of browser-based developer tools, practical technical articles, and verified promotions. Everything runs locally on your device—nothing is sent to external servers.
home.aboutText: TechHub is an independent tech resource focused on providing practical tools, quality technical content, and verified promotional offers. We prioritize accuracy, transparency, and usefulness for developers and tech enthusiasts.

articles.title: Technical Articles
articles.subtitle: In-depth tutorials, guides, and technical content for developers and tech enthusiasts.
articles.translationPending: Chinese translation is in progress. The English original is shown below.

tools.title: Developer Tools
tools.subtitle: Browser-based tools for developers. All tools run locally—no data is sent to external servers.

promos.title: Verified Promotions
promos.subtitle: Tested and verified promotional offers. We only recommend products and services we believe in.
promos.referralCtaText: If you're planning to sign up for Xfinity anyway, using this link gets you a $50 credit. It also helps me out — I get a credit too.
promos.referralCtaButton: Sign Up Through My Referral Link
promos.referralCtaNote: Takes you to the official Xfinity referral page. You can check eligibility and terms there.
promos.disclosureText: This page contains a referral link. We may receive compensation for successful referrals. Final terms and eligibility are determined by Xfinity.

about.title: About TechHub
about.missionText: TechHub was created to help developers and tech enthusiasts find practical tools, quality content, and honest recommendations. We believe in transparency, accuracy, and usefulness in everything we do.
focusItems: Browser-based developer tools that protect your privacy
Verified promotional offers from trusted sources

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.note: We typically respond within 2-3 business days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacy.collectIntro: This website may collect limited information in the following ways:
privacy.collectProvideText: If you contact us via email, we receive your email address and any content you provide.
privacy.collectAutoText: Basic non-personal data such as browser type, device information, referring pages may be collected for analytics and security purposes.
privacy.cookiesText: This website may use cookies for analytics purposes. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.thirdPartyText: We may use third-party services such as Google Analytics. These services have their own privacy policies.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this policy, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using TechHub, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.acceptText: By using this website, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.
terms.useText: All content on this website is for informational purposes only. We strive for accuracy but cannot guarantee all information is current or correct.
terms.responsibilityText: You are responsible for any actions taken based on information from this website.

editorial.title: Editorial Policy
editorial.intro: Our editorial policy outlines our commitment to quality, accuracy, and transparency.
standards: All content is reviewed for accuracy before publication
We disclose any conflicts of interest
We prioritize genuine usefulness over affiliate revenue
We update content when new information becomes available

affiliate.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliate.intro: TechHub participates in affiliate programs. This means we may earn a commission when you click links to products or services.
affiliate.transparency: We only recommend products and services we genuinely believe in.
affiliate.noCost: This doesn't cost you anything extra.

previewer.title: Content Previewer
previewer.description: Preview Markdown, validate JSON, format XML, and compare text differences—all in your browser with no data transmission.
previewer.pageTitle: Content Previewer - Markdown JSON XML Diff Tool

features.markdown: Live Markdown preview with GitHub-flavored support
features.json: Validate and format JSON with syntax highlighting
features.diff: Compare two texts and highlight differences

passport.title: Passport Photo Sizer
passport.description: A tool to help you crop and resize passport photos to meet official dimension requirements. Get your photo ready for submission to passport agencies.
